posts.text:
Astonishing.


Ryan Goodman (@rgoodlaw)

"Top Trump officials acknowledged to lawmakers during recent classified briefings that they did not plan for the possibility of Iran closing the strait in response to strikes."

cnn.com/2026/03/12/politics/…

posts.text:
More pretext for boots on the ground 👇


Steve Lookner (@lookner)

WSJ: "Reopening the strait, military analysts say, may require a ground operation to seize the Iranian coastline."
wsj.com/world/middle-east/en…
